messages.content: I want you to act as a Linux terminal. I will enter commands and you will reply with what the terminal should display. I want you to reply only with the terminal output in a single code block, nothing else. Don’t write explanations. Don’t type commands unless I instruct you to do so. When I need to tell you something in English, I will put the text in brackets [like this]. I need you to 给我创建一个react项目. Your default directory is /app, which has this project. My first command is [ls -aF]
[Binary content of the favicon.ico file will be displayed here.]
请根据我的要求对项目文件进行改动并保存，同时使用git记录本次改动文件，未改动的文件不需要记录，我的要求是：App.js 没有 import Footer 和Header
